data.title: Hims & Hers to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 11, 2026
data.description: In San Francisco, Hims & Hers Health, Inc. (NYSE: HIMS), a prominent health and wellness platform, revealed that it is set to disclose its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 after the market ends on Monday, May 11, 2026. A live conference call will be conducted to delve into these results at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day. Interested individuals can join the conference call by dialing (888) 510-2630 for U.S. participants and (646) 960-0137 for international participants.

data.title: Infinity Natural Resources Appoints Scott McNeill to Board of Directors
data.description: Infinity Natural Resources, Inc. (NYSE: INR) based in Morgantown, W. Va., has appointed Scott McNeill to its Board of Directors. Effective immediately, Mr. McNeill joins the company bringing with him over 20 years of experience in energy investment banking, capital markets, and executive roles in public and private energy firms. Throughout his career, he has held positions as CEO, CFO, and board member, contributing significantly to the growth and financing of various energy companies.

data.title: Bloomin’ Brands, Inc. to Host Fiscal 2026 First Quarter Earnings Conference Call at 8:00 AM EDT on May 6, 2026
data.description: Bloomin’ Brands, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLMN) is set to announce its fiscal first quarter results for the period ending March 29, 2026. The report will be made public on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, around 6:30 AM EDT, followed by a conference call to discuss the financial outcomes at 8:00 AM EDT on the same day. Interested individuals can tune into the live webcast of the call on the Company’s website at http://www.bloominbrands.com in the Investors section. A replay of the webcast will also be accessible on the website following the conclusion of the call.

data.title: Nu Skin Enterprises to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Utah-based Nu Skin Enterprises, Inc. (NYSE: NUS) is set to unveil its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 7 after the market closes. Following this, the company's management will conduct a conference call at 5 p.m. ET on the same day with investors. This call will cover recent performance highlights and future business strategies. Interested parties can access the webcast of the conference call, which will include the financial data shared during the discussion.

data.title: Royal Gold to Participate in the Renmark Financial Communications Virtual Non-Deal Roadshow Series on Tuesday, April 21, 2026
data.description: Royal Gold has announced its participation in the Renmark Financial Communications Virtual Non-Deal Roadshow Series happening on Tuesday, April 21, 2026. The event will provide an opportunity for Royal Gold to engage with investors and analysts. This involvement reflects the company's commitment to transparent communication and investor relations.

data.title: Granite Ridge Resources Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Granite Ridge Resources, Inc. (NYSE: GRNT) is set to release its financial and operating figures for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, May 7, 2026, after the market closes. A webcast and conference call will follow on Friday, May 8, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. CT to delve into these results further. Investors and stakeholders can mark their calendars for this event to gain insight into Granite Ridge's performance in the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: VMD Companies Closes $11.6 Million Sale to Indus at The Campus at Canopy Drive, Completing Second Major Transaction at Middleborough Industrial Park
data.description: A significant milestone has been reached by VMD Companies with back-to-back land sales totaling $18.2 million in Middleborough, Massachusetts. The recent $11.6 million sale of land to Indus, a Braintree-based roadway company, validates VMD's long-term vision for their 700,000 square foot master-planned development. This achievement showcases the successful execution of VMD's strategic plans and emphasizes the attractiveness and potential of the development project.

data.title: Sana Biotechnology and Mayo Clinic Announce Strategic Collaboration Focused on Improving Care in Type 1 Diabetes and Accelerating Development of SC451
data.description: Sana and Mayo Clinic have joined forces to work together in various areas, aiming to speed up the creation and availability of potentially curative treatments for individuals with type 1 diabetes. This collaboration sets out to revolutionize the treatment landscape for diabetes patients and improve outcomes.
Gregory M. Fischer named as Independent Director to Navitas Semiconductor's Board.

data.title: BridgeBio Oncology Therapeutics discloses Inducement Grants as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4), without specifics.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the United States has decreased to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This decrease was accompanied by an addition of 500,000 new jobs created in the latest quarter, exceeding the initial forecast of 400,000 jobs. The positive trend in job creation has been attributed to various factors, including increased consumer spending and business expansions. Economists are optimistic about the future outlook, anticipating further improvements in the employment market in the coming months.

data.title: WEYCO Group, Inc. First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Weyco Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: WEYS), a leading footwear marketer headquartered in Milwaukee, WI, is set to reveal its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 5, 2026, following market closure. Thomas W. Florsheim, Jr., the company's Chairman and CEO, will conduct a conference call on May 6, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to delve deeper into the financial performance. This update was disclosed on April 13, 2026.

data.title: Trasteel Holding S.A., a European Leader in Steel Trading and Processing, Agrees to Go Public Through a Business Combination with Sizzle Acquisition Corp. II
data.description: Trasteel Holding S.A. and Sizzle Acquisition Corp. II have agreed to merge into a new global steel trading and industrial public holding company named Pubco. The agreement, finalized on April 13, 2026, will see Trasteel and Sizzle II becoming wholly owned subsidiaries of Pubco. The merger is pending approval from both companies' shareholders and meeting customary closing conditions. Once finalized, Pubco is set to be listed on the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC under the ticker symbol "TSTL". The closing is anticipated to take place by the conclusion of 2026.

data.title: Orrstown Financial Services, Inc. Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release, Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: HARRISBURG, Pennsylvania - On April 13, 2026, Orrstown Financial Services, Inc. disclosed plans to release its first quarter earnings for 2026 on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, at the conclusion of the business day. The company, listed on NASDAQ as ORRF and the parent company of Orrstown Bank, will have management conduct a conference call and webcast to discuss the quarterly results at 9:00 am ET on Wednesday, April 22, 2026. For those interested, below are the specifics for accessing the conference call and webcast.

data.title: HighPeak Energy, Inc. to Present at the Water Tower Research Insights Conference on April 15, 2026
data.description: Fort Worth, TX - April 13, 2026 - HighPeak Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: HPK) disclosed that Mr. Michael Hollis, President and CEO, and Mr. Ryan Hightower, EVP, are scheduled to speak at the Water Tower Research Insights Conference. The virtual presentation by the HighPeak Energy executives is set for April 15, 2026. They will be participating in one-on-one meetings during the event.

data.title: Oil Prices Ease, S&P 500 Bounces Despite Trump Blockade; What Will China Do?
data.description: The market is not factoring in a lengthy blockade despite recent developments. Despite the imposition of a blockade by Trump, oil prices have slightly decreased, and the S&P 500 has rebounded. The focus now shifts to China's response amidst this situation.
